Ms. Stuti Narain Kacker shall hold office with effect from the date of taking over of charge upto 16th September, 2018, or till the age of 65 years or until further orders, whichever is earlier. [No. 3-12/2014-CW I] RASHMI SAXENA SAHNI, Jt. Secy. -- 1 of 1 --
